    impl __ExtTrait4716981883916432724 for ffi::svn_revnum_t {
        fn into_optional_revision(self) -> Option<RevisionNumber> {
            if self < 0 { None } else { Some(self.try_into().unwrap()) }
        }

    pub struct AsyncContext {

    #[doc(hidden)]
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
    pub unsafe extern "C" fn uniffi_engine_fn_clone_asynccontext(
        handle: ::uniffi::ffi::Handle,
        call_status: &mut ::uniffi::RustCallStatus,
    ) -> ::uniffi::ffi::Handle {
        ::uniffi::rust_call(
            call_status,
            || {
                unsafe { handle.clone_arc_handle::<AsyncContext>() };
                ::std::result::Result::Ok(handle)
            },
        )
    }
    #[doc(hidden)]
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
    pub unsafe extern "C" fn uniffi_engine_fn_free_asynccontext(
        handle: ::uniffi::ffi::Handle,
        call_status: &mut ::uniffi::RustCallStatus,
    ) {
        ::uniffi::rust_call(
            call_status,
            || {
                ::std::mem::drop(unsafe { handle.into_arc::<AsyncContext>() });
                ::std::result::Result::Ok(())
            },
        );
    }

        assert_impl_all::<AsyncContext>();

    #[doc(hidden)]
    #[automatically_derived]
    /// Support for passing reference-counted shared objects via the FFI.
    ///
    /// To avoid dealing with complex lifetime semantics over the FFI, any data passed
    /// by reference must be encapsulated in an `Arc`, and must be safe to share
    /// across threads.
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverterArc<UT> for AsyncContext {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi::ffi::Handle;
        /// When lowering, we have an owned `Arc` and we transfer that ownership
        /// to the foreign-language code, "leaking" it out of Rust's ownership system
        /// as a raw pointer. This works safely because we have unique ownership of `self`.
        /// The foreign-language code is responsible for freeing this by calling the
        /// `ffi_object_free` FFI function provided by the corresponding UniFFI type.
        ///
        /// Safety: when freeing the resulting pointer, the foreign-language code must
        /// call the destructor function specific to the type `T`. Calling the destructor
        /// function for other types may lead to undefined behaviour.
        fn lower(obj: ::std::sync::Arc<Self>) -> Self::FfiType {
            let handle = ::uniffi::ffi::Handle::from_arc(obj);
            handle
        }
        /// When lifting, we receive an owned `Arc` that the foreign language code cloned.
        fn try_lift(handle: Self::FfiType) -> ::uniffi::Result<::std::sync::Arc<Self>> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(unsafe { handle.into_arc() })
        }
        /// When writing as a field of a complex structure, make a clone and transfer ownership
        /// of it to the foreign-language code by writing its pointer into the buffer.
        /// The foreign-language code is responsible for freeing this by calling the
        /// `ffi_object_free` FFI function provided by the corresponding UniFFI type.
        ///
        /// Safety: when freeing the resulting pointer, the foreign-language code must
        /// call the destructor function specific to the type `T`. Calling the destructor
        /// function for other types may lead to undefined behaviour.
        fn write(obj: ::std::sync::Arc<Self>, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_u64(
                buf,
                <::std::sync::Arc<Self> as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::lower(obj)
                    .as_raw(),
            );
        }
        /// When reading as a field of a complex structure, we receive a "borrow" of the `Arc`
        /// that is owned by the foreign-language code, and make a clone for our own use.
        ///
        /// Safety: the buffer must contain a pointer previously obtained by calling
        /// the `lower()` or `write()` method of this impl.
        fn try_read(buf: &mut &[u8]) -> ::uniffi::Result<::std::sync::Arc<Self>> {
            ::uniffi::check_remaining(buf, 8)?;
            <::std::sync::Arc<
                Self,
            > as ::uniffi::Lift<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_lift(
                ::uniffi::ffi::Handle::from_raw_unchecked(
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::Buf::get_u64(buf),
                ),
            )
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_INTERFACE,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("AsyncContext");
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::LowerReturn<UT> for AsyncContext {
        type ReturnType = <::std::sync::Arc<
            Self,
        > as ::uniffi::LowerReturn<crate::UniFfiTag>>::ReturnType;
        fn lower_return(
            obj: Self,
        ) -> ::std::result::Result<Self::ReturnType, ::uniffi::RustCallError> {
            <::std::sync::Arc<
                Self,
            > as ::uniffi::LowerReturn<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::lower_return(::std::sync::Arc::new(obj))
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::LowerError<UT> for AsyncContext {
        fn lower_error(obj: Self) -> ::uniffi::RustBuffer {
            <::std::sync::Arc<
                Self,
            > as ::uniffi::LowerError<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::lower_error(::std::sync::Arc::new(obj))
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::LiftRef<UT> for AsyncContext {
        type LiftType = ::std::sync::Arc<Self>;
    }
    impl<UT> ::uniffi::TypeId<UT> for AsyncContext {
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = <::std::sync::Arc<
            Self,
        > as ::uniffi::TypeId<crate::UniFfiTag>>::TYPE_ID_META;
    }
    const UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_INTERFACE_ASYNCCONTEXT: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
            ::uniffi::metadata::codes::INTERFACE,
        )
        .concat_str("engine")
        .concat_str("AsyncContext")
        .concat_long_str("");
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]

    pub static UNIFFI_META_ENGINE_INTERFACE_ASYNCCONTEXT: [u8; UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_INTERFACE_ASYNCCONTEXT
        .size] = UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_INTERFACE_ASYNCCONTEXT.into_array();
    impl AsyncContext {
        async fn call_async<F, R>(&self, call: F) -> error::Result<R>
        where
            F: FnOnce(parking_lot::MutexGuard<'_, Context>) -> error::Result<R> + Send
                + 'static,
            R: Send + 'static,
        {
            let context = self.context.clone();
            let result = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
                    let context = context.lock();
                    call(context)
                })
                .await
                .context(builder::Runtime)??;
            Ok(result)
        }
    }
    impl AsyncContext {
        pub async fn checkout(
            &self,
            opts: CheckoutOptions,
        ) -> error::Result<RevisionNumber> {
            {
                ::std::io::_print(format_args!("opts: {0:#?}\n", opts));
            };
            {
                ::std::io::_print(
                    format_args!("debug:{0}:{1}\n", "src/subversion/context.rs", 61u32),
                );
            };
            let context = self.context.clone();
            {
                ::std::io::_print(
                    format_args!("debug:{0}:{1}\n", "src/subversion/context.rs", 63u32),
                );
            };
            let revision = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
                    {
                        ::std::io::_print(
                            format_args!(
                                "debug:{0}:{1}\n",
                                "src/subversion/context.rs",
                                65u32,
                            ),
                        );
                    };
                    let mut context = context.lock();
                    {
                        ::std::io::_print(
                            format_args!(
                                "debug:{0}:{1}\n",
                                "src/subversion/context.rs",
                                67u32,
                            ),
                        );
                    };
                    context.checkout(opts)
                })
                .await
                .context(builder::Runtime)??;
            {
                ::std::io::_print(
                    format_args!("debug:{0}:{1}\n", "src/subversion/context.rs", 72u32),
                );
            };
            Ok(revision)
        }
        pub async fn status(&self, opts: StatusOptions) -> error::Result<StatusResult> {
            let context = self.context.clone();
            let entries = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
                    let mut context = context.lock();
                    context.status(opts)
                })
                .await
                .context(builder::Runtime)??;
            Ok(entries)
        }
        pub async fn add(&self, opts: AddOptions) -> error::Result<()> {
            let context = self.context.clone();
            tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
                    let mut context = context.lock();
                    context.add(&opts)
                })
                .await
                .context(builder::Runtime)??;
            Ok(())
        }
        pub async fn commit(&self, opts: CommitOptions) -> error::Result<CommitResult> {
            let context = self.context.clone();
            let result = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || {
                    let mut context = context.lock();
                    context.commit(opts)
                })
                .await
                .context(builder::Runtime)??;
            Ok(result)
        }
        pub async fn cat(&self, opts: CatOptions) -> error::Result<CatResult> {
            self.call_async(|mut context| context.cat(opts)).await
        }
        pub async fn delete(&self, opts: DeleteOptions) -> error::Result<DeleteResult> {
            self.call_async(|mut context| context.delete(opts)).await
        }
        pub async fn revert(&self, opts: RevertOptions) -> error::Result<()> {
            self.call_async(|mut context| context.revert(opts)).await
        }
        pub async fn log(&self, opts: LogOptions) -> error::Result<LogResult> {
            self.call_async(|mut context| context.log(opts)).await
        }
        pub async fn import(&self, opts: ImportOptions) -> error::Result<ImportResult> {
            self.call_async(|mut context| context.import(opts)).await
        }
        pub fn create(opts: CreateContextOptions) -> error::Result<Self> {
            {
                ::std::io::_eprint(
                    format_args!("debug:{0}:{1}\n", "src/subversion/context.rs", 140u32),
                );
            };
            let context = ContextFactory::instance()?.create_context(opts)?;
            {
                ::std::io::_eprint(
                    format_args!("debug:{0}:{1}\n", "src/subversion/context.rs", 143u32),
                );
            };
            let context = Arc::new(parking_lot::Mutex::new(context));
            {
                ::std::io::_eprint(
                    format_args!("debug:{0}:{1}\n", "src/subversion/context.rs", 146u32),
                );
            };
            Ok(AsyncContext { context })
        }
    }

    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
    pub extern "C" fn uniffi_engine_fn_method_asynccontext_checkout(
        uniffi_self_lowered: <<AsyncContext as ::uniffi::LiftRef<
            crate::UniFfiTag,
        >>::LiftType as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
        opts: <CheckoutOptions as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
    ) -> ::uniffi::Handle {
        let uniffi_lifted_args = (move || ::std::result::Result::Ok((
            match <<AsyncContext as ::uniffi::LiftRef<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::LiftType as ::uniffi::Lift<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_lift(uniffi_self_lowered) {
                ::std::result::Result::Ok(v) => v,
                ::std::result::Result::Err(e) => {
                    return ::std::result::Result::Err(("self", e));
                }
            },
            match <CheckoutOptions as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_lift(opts) {
                ::std::result::Result::Ok(v) => v,
                ::std::result::Result::Err(e) => {
                    return ::std::result::Result::Err(("opts", e));
                }
            },
        )))();
        ::uniffi::rust_future_new::<
            _,
            error::Result<RevisionNumber>,
            _,
        >(
            async move {
                match uniffi_lifted_args {
                    ::std::result::Result::Ok(uniffi_args) => {
                        let uniffi_result = ::uniffi::deps::async_compat::Compat::new(
                                uniffi_args.0.checkout(uniffi_args.1),
                            )
                            .await;
                        Ok(uniffi_result)
                    }
                    ::std::result::Result::Err((arg_name, error)) => {
                        Err(::uniffi::LiftArgsError {
                            arg_name,
                            error,
                        })
                    }
                }
            },
            crate::UniFfiTag,
        )
    }

        .concat_str("AsyncContext")
        .concat_str("checkout")

            <error::Result<

    pub extern "C" fn uniffi_engine_fn_method_asynccontext_cat(
        uniffi_self_lowered: <<AsyncContext as ::uniffi::LiftRef<
            crate::UniFfiTag,
        >>::LiftType as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
        opts: <CatOptions as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
    ) -> ::uniffi::Handle {
        let uniffi_lifted_args = (move || ::std::result::Result::Ok((
            match <<AsyncContext as ::uniffi::LiftRef<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::LiftType as ::uniffi::Lift<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_lift(uniffi_self_lowered) {
                ::std::result::Result::Ok(v) => v,
                ::std::result::Result::Err(e) => {
                    return ::std::result::Result::Err(("self", e));
                }
            },
            match <CatOptions as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_lift(opts) {
                ::std::result::Result::Ok(v) => v,
                ::std::result::Result::Err(e) => {
                    return ::std::result::Result::Err(("opts", e));
                }
            },
        )))();
        ::uniffi::rust_future_new::<
            _,
            error::Result<CatResult>,
            _,
        >(
            async move {
                match uniffi_lifted_args {
                    ::std::result::Result::Ok(uniffi_args) => {
                        let uniffi_result = ::uniffi::deps::async_compat::Compat::new(
                                uniffi_args.0.cat(uniffi_args.1),
                            )
                            .await;
                        Ok(uniffi_result)
                    }
                    ::std::result::Result::Err((arg_name, error)) => {
                        Err(::uniffi::LiftArgsError {
                            arg_name,
                            error,
                        })
                    }
                }
            },
            crate::UniFfiTag,
        )
    }

    #[doc(hidden)]
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
    pub extern "C" fn uniffi_engine_fn_constructor_asynccontext_create(
        opts: <CreateContextOptions as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
        call_status: &mut ::uniffi::RustCallStatus,
    ) -> <error::Result<
        AsyncContext,
    > as ::uniffi::LowerReturn<crate::UniFfiTag>>::ReturnType {
        let uniffi_lift_args = move || ::std::result::Result::Ok((
            match <CreateContextOptions as ::uniffi::Lift<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_lift(opts) {
                ::std::result::Result::Ok(v) => v,
                ::std::result::Result::Err(e) => {
                    return ::std::result::Result::Err(("opts", e));
                }
            },
        ));
        ::uniffi::rust_call(
            call_status,
            || {
                let result = match uniffi_lift_args() {
                    ::std::result::Result::Ok(uniffi_args) => {
                        let uniffi_result = AsyncContext::create(uniffi_args.0);
                        let uniffi_lowered_return = <error::Result<
                            AsyncContext,
                        > as ::uniffi::LowerReturn<
                            crate::UniFfiTag,
                        >>::lower_return(uniffi_result);
                        uniffi_lowered_return
                    }
                    ::std::result::Result::Err((arg_name, error)) => {
                        <error::Result<
                            AsyncContext,
                        > as ::uniffi::LowerReturn<
                            crate::UniFfiTag,
                        >>::handle_failed_lift(::uniffi::LiftArgsError {
                            arg_name,
                            error,
                        })
                    }
                };
                result
            },
        )
    }
    const UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_CONSTRUCTOR_ASYNCCONTEXT_CREATE: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
            ::uniffi::metadata::codes::CONSTRUCTOR,

        .concat_str("engine")
        .concat_str("AsyncContext")
        .concat_str("create")
        .concat_bool(false)
        .concat_value(1u8)
        .concat_str("opts")
        .concat(
            <CreateContextOptions as ::uniffi::TypeId<crate::UniFfiTag>>::TYPE_ID_META,
        )
        .concat_bool(false)
        .concat(
            <error::Result<
                AsyncContext,

    pub trait ContextNotifier: Send + Sync + 'static {
        fn may_save_password_as_plain_text(&self, realm_string: String) -> bool;
        fn working_copy_notify(&self, notify: WorkingCopyNotify);
        fn ssl_server_trust_prompt(
            &self,
            realm: String,
            failures: u32,
            info: SslServerCertInfo,
            may_save: bool,
        ) -> Option<TrustServer>;
        fn cancel(&self) -> Option<String>;
        fn progress_notify(&self, pos: i64, total: i64);
        fn authenticate(
            &self,
            realm: String,
            username: String,
            may_save: bool,
        ) -> Option<Authentication>;
        #[doc(hidden)]
        fn uniffi_foreign_handle(&self) -> ::std::option::Option<::uniffi::Handle> {
            ::std::option::Option::None
        }
    }
    const UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_INTERFACE_CONTEXTNOTIFIER: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
            ::uniffi::metadata::codes::CALLBACK_TRAIT_INTERFACE,
        )
        .concat_str("engine")
        .concat_str("ContextNotifier")
        .concat_long_str("");
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
    #[doc(hidden)]
    pub static UNIFFI_META_ENGINE_INTERFACE_CONTEXTNOTIFIER: [u8; UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_INTERFACE_CONTEXTNOTIFIER
        .size] = UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_INTERFACE_CONTEXTNOTIFIER.into_array();
    #[doc(hidden)]
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
    /// Clone a pointer to this object type
    ///
    /// Safety: Only pass pointers returned by a UniFFI call.  Do not pass pointers that were
    /// passed to the free function.
    pub unsafe extern "C" fn uniffi_engine_fn_clone_contextnotifier(
        handle: ::uniffi::ffi::Handle,
        call_status: &mut ::uniffi::RustCallStatus,
    ) -> ::uniffi::ffi::Handle {
        ::uniffi::rust_call(
            call_status,
            || {
                unsafe {
                    ::std::result::Result::Ok(
                        handle
                            .clone_arc_handle::<::std::sync::Arc<dyn ContextNotifier>>(),
                    )
                }
            },
        )
    }
    #[doc(hidden)]
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
    /// Free a pointer to this object type
    ///
    /// Safety: Only pass pointers returned by a UniFFI call.  Do not pass pointers that were
    /// passed to the free function.
    ///
    /// Note: clippy doesn't complain about this being unsafe, but it definitely is since it
    /// calls `Box::from_raw`.
    pub unsafe extern "C" fn uniffi_engine_fn_free_contextnotifier(
        handle: ::uniffi::ffi::Handle,
        call_status: &mut ::uniffi::RustCallStatus,
    ) {
        ::uniffi::rust_call(
            call_status,
            || {
                ::std::mem::drop(unsafe {
                    handle.into_arc::<::std::sync::Arc<dyn ContextNotifier>>()
                });
                ::std::result::Result::Ok(())
            },
        );
    }
    #[allow(missing_docs)]
    pub struct UniFfiTraitVtableContextNotifier {
        pub uniffi_free: extern "C" fn(handle: u64),
        pub uniffi_clone: extern "C" fn(handle: u64) -> u64,
        pub may_save_password_as_plain_text: extern "C" fn(
            uniffi_handle: u64,
            realm_string: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
            uniffi_out_return: &mut <bool as ::uniffi::LiftReturn<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::ReturnType,
            uniffi_out_call_status: &mut ::uniffi::RustCallStatus,
        ),
        pub working_copy_notify: extern "C" fn(
            uniffi_handle: u64,
            notify: <WorkingCopyNotify as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
            uniffi_out_return: &mut <() as ::uniffi::LiftReturn<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::ReturnType,
            uniffi_out_call_status: &mut ::uniffi::RustCallStatus,
        ),
        pub ssl_server_trust_prompt: extern "C" fn(
            uniffi_handle: u64,
            realm: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
            failures: <u32 as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
            info: <SslServerCertInfo as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
            may_save: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
            uniffi_out_return: &mut <Option<
                TrustServer,

            })
        }

                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("CommitResult");
    }

    pub enum NodeKind {
        None,
        File,
        Directory,
        Unknown,
        Symlink,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for NodeKind {}
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::PartialEq for NodeKind {
        #[inline]
        fn eq(&self, other: &NodeKind) -> bool {
            let __self_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(self);
            let __arg1_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(other);
            __self_discr == __arg1_discr
        }
    }

    impl ::core::cmp::Eq for NodeKind {
        #[inline]
        #[doc(hidden)]
        #[coverage(off)]
        fn assert_receiver_is_total_eq(&self) -> () {}
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::PartialOrd for NodeKind {
        #[inline]
        fn partial_cmp(
            &self,
            other: &NodeKind,
        ) -> ::core::option::Option<::core::cmp::Ordering> {
            let __self_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(self);
            let __arg1_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(other);
            ::core::cmp::PartialOrd::partial_cmp(&__self_discr, &__arg1_discr)
        }
    }

        }

        }

    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::fmt::Debug for NodeKind {
        #[inline]
        fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
            ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(
                f,
                match self {
                    NodeKind::None => "None",
                    NodeKind::File => "File",
                    NodeKind::Directory => "Directory",
                    NodeKind::Unknown => "Unknown",
                    NodeKind::Symlink => "Symlink",
                },
            )
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for NodeKind {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            match obj {
                Self::None {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 1);
                }
                Self::File {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 2);
                }
                Self::Directory {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 3);
                }
                Self::Unknown {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 4);
                }
                Self::Symlink {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 5);
                }
            }
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::uniffi::check_remaining(buf, 4)?;
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(
                match ::uniffi::deps::bytes::Buf::get_i32(buf) {
                    1 => Self::None {},
                    2 => Self::File {},
                    3 => Self::Directory {},
                    4 => Self::Unknown {},
                    5 => Self::Symlink {},
                    v => {
                        return ::anyhow::__private::Err(
                            ::anyhow::Error::msg(
                                ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!("Invalid NodeKind enum value: {0}", v),
                                    )
                                }),
                            ),
                        );
                    }
                },
            )
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_ENUM,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("NodeKind");
    }

    impl From<NodeKind> for ffi::svn_node_kind_t {
        fn from(value: NodeKind) -> Self {
            match value {
                NodeKind::None => ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_none,
                NodeKind::File => ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_file,
                NodeKind::Directory => ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_dir,
                NodeKind::Unknown => ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_unknown,
                NodeKind::Symlink => ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_symlink,
            }
        }
    }
    impl TryFrom<ffi::svn_node_kind_t> for NodeKind {
        type Error = ();
        fn try_from(value: ffi::svn_node_kind_t) -> Result<Self, Self::Error> {
            match value {
                ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_none => Ok(NodeKind::None),
                ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_file => Ok(NodeKind::File),
                ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_dir => Ok(NodeKind::Directory),
                ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_unknown => Ok(NodeKind::Unknown),
                ffi::svn_node_kind_t_svn_node_symlink => Ok(NodeKind::Symlink),
                _ => Err(()),
            }
        }
    }
    pub struct CommitItem {
        path: String,
        kind: NodeKind,
        url: String,
        revision: RevisionNumber,
        copy_from_url: Option<String>,
        copy_from_revision: Option<RevisionNumber>,
        state: u8,
        incoming_property_changes: HashMap<String, String>,
        outgoing_property_changes: HashMap<String, String>,
        session_real_path: Option<String>,
        move_from_absolute_path: Option<String>,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for CommitItem {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.path, buf);
            <NodeKind as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.kind, buf);
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.url, buf);
            <RevisionNumber as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.revision, buf);
            <Option<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.copy_from_url, buf);
            <Option<
                RevisionNumber,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.copy_from_revision, buf);
            <u8 as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.state, buf);
            <HashMap<
                String,
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.incoming_property_changes, buf);
            <HashMap<
                String,
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.outgoing_property_changes, buf);
            <Option<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.session_real_path, buf);
            <Option<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.move_from_absolute_path, buf);
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(Self {
                path: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                kind: <NodeKind as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                url: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                revision: <RevisionNumber as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                copy_from_url: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                copy_from_revision: <Option<
                    RevisionNumber,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                state: <u8 as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                incoming_property_changes: <HashMap<
                    String,
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                outgoing_property_changes: <HashMap<
                    String,
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                session_real_path: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                move_from_absolute_path: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
            })
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("CommitItem");
    }

            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)

        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            match obj {
                Self::Inapplicable {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 1);
                }
                Self::Unknown {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 2);
                }
                Self::Unchanged {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 3);
                }
                Self::Missing {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 4);
                }
                Self::Obstructed {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 5);
                }
                Self::Changed {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 6);
                }
                Self::Merged {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 7);
                }
                Self::Conflicted {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 8);
                }
                Self::SourceMissing {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 9);
                }
            }
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::uniffi::check_remaining(buf, 4)?;
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(
                match ::uniffi::deps::bytes::Buf::get_i32(buf) {
                    1 => Self::Inapplicable {},
                    2 => Self::Unknown {},
                    3 => Self::Unchanged {},
                    4 => Self::Missing {},
                    5 => Self::Obstructed {},
                    6 => Self::Changed {},
                    7 => Self::Merged {},
                    8 => Self::Conflicted {},
                    9 => Self::SourceMissing {},
                    v => {
                        return ::anyhow::__private::Err(
                            ::anyhow::Error::msg(
                                ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!(
                                            "Invalid WorkingCopyNotifyState enum value: {0}",

                            ),

                },
            )

        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            match obj {
                Self::InApplicable {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 1);
                }
                Self::Unknown {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 2);
                }
                Self::Unchanged {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 3);
                }
                Self::Locked {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 4);
                }
                Self::Unlocked {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 5);
                }
            }
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::uniffi::check_remaining(buf, 4)?;
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(
                match ::uniffi::deps::bytes::Buf::get_i32(buf) {
                    1 => Self::InApplicable {},
                    2 => Self::Unknown {},
                    3 => Self::Unchanged {},
                    4 => Self::Locked {},
                    5 => Self::Unlocked {},
                    v => {
                        return ::anyhow::__private::Err(
                            ::anyhow::Error::msg(
                                ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!(
                                            "Invalid WorkingCopyNotifyLockState enum value: {0}",
                                            v,
                                        ),
                                    )
                                }),
                            ),
                        );
                    }
                },
            )
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_ENUM,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("WorkingCopyNotifyLockState");
    }

                    ffi::svn_wc_notify_lock_state_t_svn_wc_notify_lock_state_unknown
                }
                WorkingCopyNotifyLockState::Unchanged => {
                    ffi::svn_wc_notify_lock_state_t_svn_wc_notify_lock_state_unchanged
                }
                WorkingCopyNotifyLockState::Locked => {
                    ffi::svn_wc_notify_lock_state_t_svn_wc_notify_lock_state_locked
                }

                    ffi::svn_wc_notify_lock_state_t_svn_wc_notify_lock_state_unlocked

    pub struct MergeRange {
        start: i64,
        end: i64,
        inheritable: bool,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::fmt::Debug for MergeRange {
        #[inline]
        fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
            ::core::fmt::Formatter::debug_struct_field3_finish(
                f,
                "MergeRange",
                "start",
                &self.start,
                "end",
                &self.end,
                "inheritable",
                &&self.inheritable,
            )
        }
    }

            let _: ::core::clone::AssertParamIsClone<i64>;
            let _: ::core::clone::AssertParamIsClone<bool>;
            *self
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::hash::Hash for MergeRange {
        #[inline]
        fn hash<__H: ::core::hash::Hasher>(&self, state: &mut __H) -> () {
            ::core::hash::Hash::hash(&self.start, state);
            ::core::hash::Hash::hash(&self.end, state);
            ::core::hash::Hash::hash(&self.inheritable, state)
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for MergeRange {}
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::PartialEq for MergeRange {
        #[inline]
        fn eq(&self, other: &MergeRange) -> bool {
            self.start == other.start && self.end == other.end
                && self.inheritable == other.inheritable
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::Eq for MergeRange {
        #[inline]
        #[doc(hidden)]
        #[coverage(off)]
        fn assert_receiver_is_total_eq(&self) -> () {
            let _: ::core::cmp::AssertParamIsEq<i64>;
            let _: ::core::cmp::AssertParamIsEq<bool>;
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::PartialOrd for MergeRange {
        #[inline]
        fn partial_cmp(
            &self,
            other: &MergeRange,
        ) -> ::core::option::Option<::core::cmp::Ordering> {
            match ::core::cmp::PartialOrd::partial_cmp(&self.start, &other.start) {
                ::core::option::Option::Some(::core::cmp::Ordering::Equal) => {
                    match ::core::cmp::PartialOrd::partial_cmp(&self.end, &other.end) {
                        ::core::option::Option::Some(::core::cmp::Ordering::Equal) => {
                            ::core::cmp::PartialOrd::partial_cmp(
                                &self.inheritable,
                                &other.inheritable,
                            )
                        }
                        cmp => cmp,
                    }
                }
                cmp => cmp,
            }
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::Ord for MergeRange {
        #[inline]
        fn cmp(&self, other: &MergeRange) -> ::core::cmp::Ordering {
            match ::core::cmp::Ord::cmp(&self.start, &other.start) {
                ::core::cmp::Ordering::Equal => {
                    match ::core::cmp::Ord::cmp(&self.end, &other.end) {
                        ::core::cmp::Ordering::Equal => {
                            ::core::cmp::Ord::cmp(&self.inheritable, &other.inheritable)
                        }
                        cmp => cmp,
                    }
                }
                cmp => cmp,
            }
        }
    }

    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for MergeRange {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <i64 as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.start, buf);
            <i64 as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.end, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.inheritable, buf);
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(Self {
                start: <i64 as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                end: <i64 as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                inheritable: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
            })
        }

                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("MergeRange");
    }

    pub struct WorkingCopyNotify {
        pub path: String,
        pub action: WorkingCopyNotifyAction,
        pub kind: NodeKind,
        pub mime_type: Option<String>,
        pub lock: Option<Lock>,
        pub err: Option<SVNError>,
        pub content_state: WorkingCopyNotifyState,
        pub property_state: WorkingCopyNotifyState,
        pub lock_state: WorkingCopyNotifyLockState,
        pub revision: Option<RevisionNumber>,
        pub changelist_name: Option<String>,
        pub merge_range: Option<MergeRange>,
        pub url: Option<String>,
        pub path_prefix: Option<String>,
        pub property_name: Option<String>,
        pub revision_properties: HashMap<String, String>,
        pub old_revision: Option<RevisionNumber>,
        pub hunk_original_start: u32,
        pub hunk_original_length: u32,
        pub hunk_modified_start: u32,
        pub hunk_modified_length: u32,
        pub hunk_matched_line: u32,
        pub hunk_fuzz: u32,
    }

    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for WorkingCopyNotify {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.path, buf);
            <WorkingCopyNotifyAction as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.action, buf);
            <NodeKind as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.kind, buf);
            <Option<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.mime_type, buf);
            <Option<Lock> as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.lock, buf);
            <Option<SVNError> as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.err, buf);
            <WorkingCopyNotifyState as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.content_state, buf);
            <WorkingCopyNotifyState as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.property_state, buf);
            <WorkingCopyNotifyLockState as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.lock_state, buf);
            <Option<
                RevisionNumber,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.revision, buf);
            <Option<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.changelist_name, buf);
            <Option<
                MergeRange,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.merge_range, buf);
            <Option<String> as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.url, buf);
            <Option<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.path_prefix, buf);
            <Option<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.property_name, buf);
            <HashMap<
                String,
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.revision_properties, buf);
            <Option<
                RevisionNumber,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.old_revision, buf);
            <u32 as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.hunk_original_start, buf);
            <u32 as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.hunk_original_length, buf);
            <u32 as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.hunk_modified_start, buf);
            <u32 as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.hunk_modified_length, buf);
            <u32 as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.hunk_matched_line, buf);
            <u32 as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.hunk_fuzz, buf);
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(Self {
                path: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                action: <WorkingCopyNotifyAction as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                kind: <NodeKind as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                mime_type: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                lock: <Option<Lock> as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                err: <Option<
                    SVNError,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                content_state: <WorkingCopyNotifyState as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                property_state: <WorkingCopyNotifyState as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                lock_state: <WorkingCopyNotifyLockState as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                revision: <Option<
                    RevisionNumber,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                changelist_name: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                merge_range: <Option<
                    MergeRange,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                url: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                path_prefix: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                property_name: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                revision_properties: <HashMap<
                    String,
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                old_revision: <Option<
                    RevisionNumber,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                hunk_original_start: <u32 as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                hunk_original_length: <u32 as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                hunk_modified_start: <u32 as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                hunk_modified_length: <u32 as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                hunk_matched_line: <u32 as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                hunk_fuzz: <u32 as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
            })
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,

            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("WorkingCopyNotify");

    pub static UNIFFI_META_ENGINE_RECORD_WORKINGCOPYNOTIFY: [u8; UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_RECORD_WORKINGCOPYNOTIFY
        .size] = UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_RECORD_WORKINGCOPYNOTIFY.into_array();
    impl WorkingCopyNotify {
        unsafe fn from_raw(ptr: *const ffi::svn_wc_notify_t) -> Self {
            unsafe {
                let ptr = ptr.as_ref().unwrap();
                let path = apr::char_array_to_string(ptr.path).unwrap();
                let action = WorkingCopyNotifyAction::try_from(ptr.action)
                    .expect(
                        ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                    format_args!("Invalid notify action: {0}", ptr.action),
                                )
                            })
                            .as_str(),
                    );
                let kind = NodeKind::try_from(ptr.kind)
                    .expect(
                        ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                    format_args!("Invalid node kind: {0}", ptr.kind),
                                )
                            })
                            .as_str(),
                    );
                let mime_type = apr::char_array_to_string(ptr.mime_type);
                let lock = ptr.lock.as_ref().map(|v| Lock::from_ptr(v));
                let err = ptr.err.as_ref().map(|v| SVNError::from_not_null_ptr(ptr.err));
                let content_state = WorkingCopyNotifyState::try_from(ptr.content_state)
                    .unwrap();
                let property_state = WorkingCopyNotifyState::try_from(ptr.prop_state)
                    .unwrap();
                let lock_state = WorkingCopyNotifyLockState::try_from(ptr.lock_state)
                    .unwrap();
                {
                    ::std::io::_print(
                        format_args!("WorkingCopyNotify revision: {0}\n", ptr.revision),
                    );
                };
                let revision = if ptr.revision < 0 {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(ptr.revision.try_into().unwrap())
                };
                let changelist_name = apr::char_array_to_string(ptr.changelist_name);
                let merge_range = if ptr.merge_range.is_null() {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(MergeRange::from_raw(ptr.merge_range))
                };
                let url = apr::char_array_to_string(ptr.url);
                let path_prefix = if ptr.path_prefix.is_null() {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(apr::char_array_to_string(ptr.path_prefix).unwrap())
                };
                let property_name = if ptr.prop_name.is_null() {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(apr::char_array_to_string(ptr.prop_name).unwrap())
                };
                let revision_properties = HashMap::default();
                let old_revision = if ptr.old_revision < 0 {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(ptr.old_revision.try_into().unwrap())
                };
                let hunk_original_start = ptr.hunk_original_start.try_into().unwrap();
                let hunk_original_length = ptr.hunk_original_length.try_into().unwrap();
                let hunk_modified_start = ptr.hunk_modified_start.try_into().unwrap();
                let hunk_modified_length = ptr.hunk_modified_length.try_into().unwrap();
                let hunk_matched_line = ptr.hunk_matched_line.try_into().unwrap();
                let hunk_fuzz = ptr.hunk_fuzz.try_into().unwrap();
                Self {
                    path,
                    action,
                    kind,
                    mime_type,
                    lock,
                    err,
                    content_state,
                    property_state,
                    lock_state,
                    revision,
                    changelist_name,
                    merge_range,
                    url,
                    path_prefix,
                    property_name,
                    revision_properties,
                    old_revision,
                    hunk_original_start,
                    hunk_original_length,
                    hunk_modified_start,
                    hunk_modified_length,
                    hunk_matched_line,
                    hunk_fuzz,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    pub enum WorkingCopyNotifyAction {
        Add,
        Copy,
        Delete,
        Restore,
        Revert,
        FailedRevert,
        Resolved,
        Skip,
        UpdateDelete,
        UpdateAdd,
        UpdateUpdate,
        UpdateCompleted,
        UpdateExternal,
        StatusCompleted,
        StatusExternal,
        CommitModified,
        CommitDeleted,
        CommitReplaced,
        CommitPostfixTxDelta,

        UpdateReplace,

        PropertyDeleted,
        PropertyDeletedNonexistent,
        RevisionPropertySet,
        RevisionPropertyDeleted,
        MergeCompleted,
        TreeConflict,
        FailedExternal,
        UpdateStarted,
        UpdateSkipObstruction,
        UpdateSkipWorkingOnly,
        UpdateSkipAccessDenied,
        UpdateExternalRemoved,
        UpdateShadowedAdd,
        UpdateShadowedUpdate,
        UpdateShadowedDelete,
        MergeRecordInfo,
        MergeElideInfo,
        Patch,
        PatchAppliedHunk,
        PatchRejectHunk,
        PatchHunkAlreadyApplied,
        CommitCopied,
        CommitCopiedReplaced,
        UrlRedirect,
        PathNonexistent,
        Exclude,
        FailedConflict,
        FailedMissing,
        FailedOutOfDate,
        FailedNoParent,
        FailedLocked,
        FailedForbiddenByServer,
        SkipConflicted,
        UpdateBrokenLock,
        FailedObstruction,
        ConflictResolverDone,
        LeftLocalModifications,
        ForeignCopyBegin,
        MoveBroken,
        CleanupExternal,
        FailedRequiresTarget,
        InfoExternal,
        CommitFinalizing,
        ResolvedText,
        ResolvedProp,
        ResolvedTree,
        BeginSearchTreeConflictDetails,
        TreeConflictDetailsProgress,
        EndSearchTreeConflictDetails,
        HydratingStart,
        HydratingFile,
        HydratingEnd,
        Warning,
        RevertNoAccess,
    }

        #[inline]
        fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
            ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(
                f,

                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::StatusCompleted => "StatusCompleted",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::StatusExternal => "StatusExternal",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::CommitModified => "CommitModified",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::CommitDeleted => "CommitDeleted",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::CommitReplaced => "CommitReplaced",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::CommitPostfixTxDelta => {
                        "CommitPostfixTxDelta"
                    }
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::BlameRevision => "BlameRevision",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::Locked => "Locked",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::Unlocked => "Unlocked",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::FailedLock => "FailedLock",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::FailedUnlock => "FailedUnlock",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::Exists => "Exists",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::ChangelistSet => "ChangelistSet",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::ChangelistClear => "ChangelistClear",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::ChangelistMoved => "ChangelistMoved",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::MergeBegin => "MergeBegin",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::ForeignMergeBegin => "ForeignMergeBegin",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::UpdateReplace => "UpdateReplace",
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::PropertyAdded => "PropertyAdded",

                        "PropertyDeletedNonexistent"
                    }

                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::RevisionPropertyDeleted => {
                        "RevisionPropertyDeleted"
                    }
                    WorkingCopyNotifyAction::MergeCompleted => "MergeCompleted",

    pub enum Depth {
        Unknown,
        Exclude,
        Empty,
        Files,
        Immediate,
        Infinity,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::fmt::Debug for Depth {
        #[inline]
        fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
            ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(
                f,
                match self {
                    Depth::Unknown => "Unknown",
                    Depth::Exclude => "Exclude",
                    Depth::Empty => "Empty",
                    Depth::Files => "Files",
                    Depth::Immediate => "Immediate",
                    Depth::Infinity => "Infinity",
                },
            )
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::clone::Clone for Depth {
        #[inline]
        fn clone(&self) -> Depth {
            *self
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::marker::Copy for Depth {}
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for Depth {}
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::PartialEq for Depth {
        #[inline]
        fn eq(&self, other: &Depth) -> bool {
            let __self_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(self);
            let __arg1_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(other);
            __self_discr == __arg1_discr
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::Eq for Depth {
        #[inline]
        #[doc(hidden)]
        #[coverage(off)]
        fn assert_receiver_is_total_eq(&self) -> () {}
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::PartialOrd for Depth {
        #[inline]
        fn partial_cmp(
            &self,
            other: &Depth,
        ) -> ::core::option::Option<::core::cmp::Ordering> {
            let __self_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(self);
            let __arg1_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(other);
            ::core::cmp::PartialOrd::partial_cmp(&__self_discr, &__arg1_discr)
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::cmp::Ord for Depth {
        #[inline]
        fn cmp(&self, other: &Depth) -> ::core::cmp::Ordering {
            let __self_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(self);
            let __arg1_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(other);
            ::core::cmp::Ord::cmp(&__self_discr, &__arg1_discr)
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::hash::Hash for Depth {
        #[inline]
        fn hash<__H: ::core::hash::Hasher>(&self, state: &mut __H) -> () {
            let __self_discr = ::core::intrinsics::discriminant_value(self);
            ::core::hash::Hash::hash(&__self_discr, state)
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for Depth {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            match obj {
                Self::Unknown {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 1);
                }
                Self::Exclude {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 2);
                }
                Self::Empty {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 3);
                }
                Self::Files {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 4);
                }
                Self::Immediate {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 5);
                }
                Self::Infinity {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 6);
                }
            }
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::uniffi::check_remaining(buf, 4)?;
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(
                match ::uniffi::deps::bytes::Buf::get_i32(buf) {
                    1 => Self::Unknown {},
                    2 => Self::Exclude {},
                    3 => Self::Empty {},
                    4 => Self::Files {},
                    5 => Self::Immediate {},
                    6 => Self::Infinity {},
                    v => {
                        return ::anyhow::__private::Err(
                            ::anyhow::Error::msg(
                                ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!("Invalid Depth enum value: {0}", v),
                                    )
                                }),
                            ),
                        );
                    }
                },
            )
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_ENUM,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("Depth");
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT> for Depth {
        type FfiType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::FfiType;
        fn lower(obj: Self) -> Self::FfiType {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::lower(obj)
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::write(obj, buf)
        }
    }

        fn try_lift(v: Self::FfiType) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {

        }
    }

            v: Self,
        ) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<
            Self::ReturnType,

            ::std::result::Result::Ok(<Self as ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT>>::lower(v))
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LowerError<UT> for Depth {

            <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT>>::lower_into_rust_buffer(obj)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LiftReturn<UT> for Depth {

        fn try_lift_successful_return(
            v: Self::ReturnType,
        ) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lift<UT>>::try_lift(v)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LiftRef<UT> for Depth {
        type LiftType = Self;
    }
    impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::ConvertError<UT> for Depth {
        fn try_convert_unexpected_callback_error(
            e: ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackError,
        ) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            {
                pub trait GetConverterGeneric {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterGeneric;
                }
                impl<T> GetConverterGeneric for &T {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterGeneric {
                        ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterGeneric
                    }
                }
                #[allow(dead_code)]
                pub trait GetConverterSpecialized {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized;
                }
                impl<T: ::std::convert::Into<Depth>> GetConverterSpecialized for T {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized {
                        ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized
                    }
                }
                (&e).get_converter().try_convert_unexpected_callback_error(e)
            }
        }
    }

    impl From<Depth> for ffi::svn_depth_t {
        fn from(value: Depth) -> Self {
            match value {
                Depth::Unknown => ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_unknown,
                Depth::Exclude => ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_exclude,
                Depth::Empty => ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_empty,
                Depth::Files => ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_files,
                Depth::Immediate => ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_immediates,
                Depth::Infinity => ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_infinity,
            }
        }
    }
    impl TryFrom<ffi::svn_depth_t> for Depth {
        type Error = ();
        fn try_from(value: ffi::svn_depth_t) -> Result<Self, Self::Error> {
            match value {
                ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_unknown => Ok(Depth::Unknown),
                ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_exclude => Ok(Depth::Exclude),
                ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_empty => Ok(Depth::Empty),
                ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_files => Ok(Depth::Files),
                ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_immediates => Ok(Depth::Immediate),
                ffi::svn_depth_t_svn_depth_infinity => Ok(Depth::Infinity),
                _ => Err(()),
            }
        }
    }
    pub struct AddOptions {
        path: String,
        depth: Depth,
        force: bool,
        no_ignore: bool,
        no_auto_properties: bool,
        add_parents: bool,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for AddOptions {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.path, buf);
            <Depth as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.depth, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.force, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.no_ignore, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.no_auto_properties, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.add_parents, buf);
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(Self {
                path: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                depth: <Depth as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                force: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                no_ignore: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                no_auto_properties: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                add_parents: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
            })
        }

                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("AddOptions");
    }

                        ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized

    pub struct StatusEntry {

        moved_to_absolute_path: Option<String>,

        type FfiType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::FfiType;
