    pub struct CommitOptions {
        targets: Vec<String>,
        depth: Depth,
        keep_locks: bool,
        keep_changelist: bool,
        commit_as_operations: bool,
        include_file_externals: bool,
        include_dir_externals: bool,
        changelists: Vec<String>,
        revision_property_table: HashMap<String, String>,
        commit_message: String,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for CommitOptions {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <Vec<String> as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.targets, buf);
            <Depth as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.depth, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.keep_locks, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.keep_changelist, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.commit_as_operations, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.include_file_externals, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.include_dir_externals, buf);
            <Vec<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.changelists, buf);
            <HashMap<
                String,
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.revision_property_table, buf);
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.commit_message, buf);
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(Self {
                targets: <Vec<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                depth: <Depth as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                keep_locks: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                keep_changelist: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                commit_as_operations: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                include_file_externals: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                include_dir_externals: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                changelists: <Vec<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                revision_property_table: <HashMap<
                    String,
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                commit_message: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
            })
        }

                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("CommitOptions");

    pub struct CommitInfo {
        revision: RevisionNumber,
        date: String,
        author: String,
        post_commit_err: Option<String>,
        repos_root: Option<String>,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::default::Default for CommitInfo {
        #[inline]
        fn default() -> CommitInfo {
            CommitInfo {
                revision: ::core::default::Default::default(),
                date: ::core::default::Default::default(),
                author: ::core::default::Default::default(),
                post_commit_err: ::core::default::Default::default(),
                repos_root: ::core::default::Default::default(),
            }
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::fmt::Debug for CommitInfo {

            ::core::fmt::Formatter::debug_struct_field5_finish(
                f,
                "CommitInfo",
                "revision",
                &self.revision,
                "date",
                &self.date,
                "author",
                &self.author,
                "post_commit_err",
                &self.post_commit_err,
                "repos_root",
                &&self.repos_root,
            )
        }
    }

                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <RevisionNumber as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.revision, buf);
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.date, buf);
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.author, buf);
            <Option<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.post_commit_err, buf);
            <Option<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.repos_root, buf);
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(Self {
                revision: <RevisionNumber as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                date: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                author: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                post_commit_err: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                repos_root: <Option<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
            })
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("CommitInfo");
    }

    pub enum NodeStatus {
        None,
        Unversioned,
        Normal,
        Added,
        Missing,
        Deleted,
        Replaced,
        Modified,
        Merged,
        Conflicted,
        Ignored,
        Obstructed,
        External,
        Incomplete,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::fmt::Debug for NodeStatus {
        #[inline]
        fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
            ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(
                f,
                match self {
                    NodeStatus::None => "None",
                    NodeStatus::Unversioned => "Unversioned",
                    NodeStatus::Normal => "Normal",
                    NodeStatus::Added => "Added",
                    NodeStatus::Missing => "Missing",
                    NodeStatus::Deleted => "Deleted",
                    NodeStatus::Replaced => "Replaced",
                    NodeStatus::Modified => "Modified",
                    NodeStatus::Merged => "Merged",
                    NodeStatus::Conflicted => "Conflicted",
                    NodeStatus::Ignored => "Ignored",
                    NodeStatus::Obstructed => "Obstructed",
                    NodeStatus::External => "External",
                    NodeStatus::Incomplete => "Incomplete",
                },
            )
        }
    }

    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for NodeStatus {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            match obj {
                Self::None {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 1);
                }
                Self::Unversioned {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 2);
                }
                Self::Normal {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 3);
                }
                Self::Added {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 4);
                }
                Self::Missing {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 5);
                }
                Self::Deleted {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 6);
                }
                Self::Replaced {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 7);
                }
                Self::Modified {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 8);
                }
                Self::Merged {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 9);
                }
                Self::Conflicted {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 10);
                }
                Self::Ignored {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 11);
                }
                Self::Obstructed {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 12);
                }
                Self::External {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 13);
                }
                Self::Incomplete {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 14);
                }
            }
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::uniffi::check_remaining(buf, 4)?;
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(
                match ::uniffi::deps::bytes::Buf::get_i32(buf) {
                    1 => Self::None {},
                    2 => Self::Unversioned {},
                    3 => Self::Normal {},
                    4 => Self::Added {},
                    5 => Self::Missing {},
                    6 => Self::Deleted {},
                    7 => Self::Replaced {},
                    8 => Self::Modified {},
                    9 => Self::Merged {},
                    10 => Self::Conflicted {},
                    11 => Self::Ignored {},
                    12 => Self::Obstructed {},
                    13 => Self::External {},
                    14 => Self::Incomplete {},
                    v => {
                        return ::anyhow::__private::Err(
                            ::anyhow::Error::msg(
                                ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!("Invalid NodeStatus enum value: {0}", v),
                                    )
                                }),
                            ),
                        );
                    }
                },
            )
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_ENUM,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("NodeStatus");
    }

    impl From<NodeStatus> for ffi::svn_wc_status_kind {
        fn from(value: NodeStatus) -> Self {
            match value {
                NodeStatus::None => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_none,
                NodeStatus::Unversioned => {
                    ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_unversioned
                }
                NodeStatus::Normal => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_normal,
                NodeStatus::Added => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_added,
                NodeStatus::Missing => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_missing,
                NodeStatus::Deleted => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_deleted,
                NodeStatus::Replaced => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_replaced,
                NodeStatus::Modified => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_modified,
                NodeStatus::Merged => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_merged,
                NodeStatus::Conflicted => {
                    ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_conflicted
                }
                NodeStatus::Ignored => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_ignored,
                NodeStatus::Obstructed => {
                    ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_obstructed
                }
                NodeStatus::External => ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_external,
                NodeStatus::Incomplete => {
                    ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_incomplete
                }
            }
        }
    }
    impl TryFrom<ffi::svn_wc_status_kind> for NodeStatus {
        type Error = ();
        fn try_from(value: ffi::svn_wc_status_kind) -> Result<Self, Self::Error> {
            match value {
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_none => Ok(NodeStatus::None),
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_unversioned => {
                    Ok(NodeStatus::Unversioned)
                }
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_normal => Ok(NodeStatus::Normal),
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_added => Ok(NodeStatus::Added),
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_missing => Ok(NodeStatus::Missing),
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_deleted => Ok(NodeStatus::Deleted),
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_replaced => {
                    Ok(NodeStatus::Replaced)
                }
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_modified => {
                    Ok(NodeStatus::Modified)
                }
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_merged => Ok(NodeStatus::Merged),
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_conflicted => {
                    Ok(NodeStatus::Conflicted)
                }
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_ignored => Ok(NodeStatus::Ignored),
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_obstructed => {
                    Ok(NodeStatus::Obstructed)
                }
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_external => {
                    Ok(NodeStatus::External)
                }
                ffi::svn_wc_status_kind_svn_wc_status_incomplete => {
                    Ok(NodeStatus::Incomplete)
                }
                _ => Err(()),
            }
        }
    }
    pub enum Revision {
        Unspecified,
        Number(RevisionNumber),
        Date(i64),
        Committed,
        Previous,
        Base,
        Working,
        Head,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::clone::Clone for Revision {
        #[inline]
        fn clone(&self) -> Revision {
            let _: ::core::clone::AssertParamIsClone<RevisionNumber>;
            let _: ::core::clone::AssertParamIsClone<i64>;
            *self
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::marker::Copy for Revision {}
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::fmt::Debug for Revision {
        #[inline]
        fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
            match self {
                Revision::Unspecified => {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "Unspecified")
                }
                Revision::Number(__self_0) => {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::debug_tuple_field1_finish(
                        f,
                        "Number",
                        &__self_0,
                    )
                }
                Revision::Date(__self_0) => {
                    ::core::fmt::Formatter::debug_tuple_field1_finish(
                        f,
                        "Date",
                        &__self_0,
                    )
                }
                Revision::Committed => ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "Committed"),
                Revision::Previous => ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "Previous"),
                Revision::Base => ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "Base"),
                Revision::Working => ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "Working"),
                Revision::Head => ::core::fmt::Formatter::write_str(f, "Head"),
            }
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for Revision {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            match obj {
                Self::Unspecified {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 1);
                }
                Self::Number(e0) => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 2);
                    <RevisionNumber as ::uniffi::Lower<
                        crate::UniFfiTag,
                    >>::write(e0, buf);
                }
                Self::Date(e0) => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 3);
                    <i64 as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(e0, buf);
                }
                Self::Committed {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 4);
                }
                Self::Previous {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 5);
                }
                Self::Base {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 6);
                }
                Self::Working {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 7);
                }
                Self::Head {} => {
                    ::uniffi::deps::bytes::BufMut::put_i32(buf, 8);
                }
            }
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::uniffi::check_remaining(buf, 4)?;
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(
                match ::uniffi::deps::bytes::Buf::get_i32(buf) {
                    1 => Self::Unspecified {},
                    2 => {
                        Self::Number(
                            <RevisionNumber as ::uniffi::Lift<
                                crate::UniFfiTag,
                            >>::try_read(buf)?,
                        )
                    }
                    3 => {
                        Self::Date(
                            <i64 as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                        )
                    }
                    4 => Self::Committed {},
                    5 => Self::Previous {},
                    6 => Self::Base {},
                    7 => Self::Working {},
                    8 => Self::Head {},
                    v => {
                        return ::anyhow::__private::Err(
                            ::anyhow::Error::msg(
                                ::alloc::__export::must_use({
                                    ::alloc::fmt::format(
                                        format_args!("Invalid Revision enum value: {0}", v),
                                    )
                                }),
                            ),
                        );
                    }
                },
            )
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_ENUM,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("Revision");
    }

            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::lower(obj)

        changelist: Vec<String>,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::fmt::Debug for StatusOptions {
        #[inline]

    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for StatusOptions {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.path, buf);
            <Revision as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.revision, buf);
            <Depth as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.depth, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.get_all, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.update, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.check_out_of_date, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.check_working_copy, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.no_ignore, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::write(obj.ignore_externals, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.depth_as_sticky, buf);
            <Vec<
                String,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.changelist, buf);
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(Self {
                path: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                revision: <Revision as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                depth: <Depth as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                get_all: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                update: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                check_out_of_date: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                check_working_copy: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                no_ignore: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                ignore_externals: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                depth_as_sticky: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                changelist: <Vec<
                    String,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
            })
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("StatusOptions");
    }

    pub struct CheckoutOptions {
        url: String,
        path: String,
        peg_revision: Revision,
        revision: Revision,
        depth: Depth,
        ignore_externals: bool,
        allow_unversioned_obstructions: bool,
        store_pristine: Option<bool>,
    }
    impl CheckoutOptions {
        ///Constructs a new `CheckoutOptions`.
        pub fn new(
            url: String,
            path: String,
            peg_revision: Revision,
            revision: Revision,
            depth: Depth,
            ignore_externals: bool,
            allow_unversioned_obstructions: bool,
            store_pristine: Option<bool>,
        ) -> Self {
            CheckoutOptions {
                url: url,
                path: path,
                peg_revision: peg_revision,
                revision: revision,
                depth: depth,
                ignore_externals: ignore_externals,
                allow_unversioned_obstructions: allow_unversioned_obstructions,
                store_pristine: store_pristine,
            }
        }
    }

    pub struct Lock {
        path: String,
        token: String,
        owner: String,
        comment: String,
        is_dav_comment: bool,
        creation_date: i64,
        expiration_date: i64,
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::fmt::Debug for Lock {
        #[inline]
        fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
            let names: &'static _ = &[
                "path",
                "token",
                "owner",
                "comment",
                "is_dav_comment",
                "creation_date",
                "expiration_date",
            ];
            let values: &[&dyn ::core::fmt::Debug] = &[
                &self.path,
                &self.token,
                &self.owner,
                &self.comment,
                &self.is_dav_comment,
                &self.creation_date,
                &&self.expiration_date,
            ];
            ::core::fmt::Formatter::debug_struct_fields_finish(f, "Lock", names, values)
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::clone::Clone for Lock {
        #[inline]
        fn clone(&self) -> Lock {
            Lock {
                path: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.path),
                token: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.token),
                owner: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.owner),
                comment: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.comment),
                is_dav_comment: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.is_dav_comment),
                creation_date: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.creation_date),
                expiration_date: ::core::clone::Clone::clone(&self.expiration_date),
            }
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for Lock {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.path, buf);
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.token, buf);
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.owner, buf);
            <String as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.comment, buf);
            <bool as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.is_dav_comment, buf);
            <i64 as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.creation_date, buf);
            <i64 as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.expiration_date, buf);
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(Self {
                path: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                token: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                owner: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                comment: <String as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                is_dav_comment: <bool as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
                creation_date: <i64 as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
                expiration_date: <i64 as ::uniffi::Lift<
                    crate::UniFfiTag,
                >>::try_read(buf)?,
            })
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("Lock");
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT> for Lock {
        type FfiType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::FfiType;
        fn lower(obj: Self) -> Self::FfiType {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::lower(obj)
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::write(obj, buf)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::Lift<UT> for Lock {
        type FfiType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::FfiType;
        fn try_lift(v: Self::FfiType) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::try_lift(v)
        }
        fn try_read(buf: &mut &[u8]) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::try_read(buf)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LowerReturn<UT> for Lock {
        type ReturnType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT>>::FfiType;
        fn lower_return(
            v: Self,
        ) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<
            Self::ReturnType,
            ::uniffi_core::RustCallError,
        > {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(<Self as ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT>>::lower(v))
        }
    }

        fn lower_error(obj: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT>>::lower_into_rust_buffer(obj)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LiftReturn<UT> for Lock {
        type ReturnType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lift<UT>>::FfiType;
        fn try_lift_successful_return(
            v: Self::ReturnType,
        ) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lift<UT>>::try_lift(v)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LiftRef<UT> for Lock {
        type LiftType = Self;
    }
    impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::ConvertError<UT> for Lock {
        fn try_convert_unexpected_callback_error(
            e: ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackError,
        ) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            {
                pub trait GetConverterGeneric {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterGeneric;
                }
                impl<T> GetConverterGeneric for &T {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterGeneric {
                        ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterGeneric
                    }
                }
                #[allow(dead_code)]
                pub trait GetConverterSpecialized {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized;
                }
                impl<T: ::std::convert::Into<Lock>> GetConverterSpecialized for T {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized {
                        ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized
                    }
                }
                (&e).get_converter().try_convert_unexpected_callback_error(e)
            }
        }
    }

            UT,

    impl Default for Revision {
        fn default() -> Self {
            Self::Unspecified
        }
    }
    impl Revision {
        fn to_opt_revision(&self) -> ffi::svn_opt_revision_t {
            let mut revision = ffi::svn_opt_revision_t::default();
            match self {
                Revision::Unspecified => {
                    revision.kind = ffi::svn_opt_revision_kind_svn_opt_revision_unspecified;
                }
                Revision::Number(number) => {
                    revision.kind = ffi::svn_opt_revision_kind_svn_opt_revision_number;
                    unsafe {
                        *revision.value.number.as_mut() = (*number).try_into().unwrap();
                    }
                }
                Revision::Date(time) => {
                    revision.kind = ffi::svn_opt_revision_kind_svn_opt_revision_date;
                    unsafe {
                        *revision.value.date.as_mut() = (*time).try_into().unwrap();
                    }
                }
                Revision::Committed => {
                    revision.kind = ffi::svn_opt_revision_kind_svn_opt_revision_committed;
                }
                Revision::Previous => {
                    revision.kind = ffi::svn_opt_revision_kind_svn_opt_revision_previous;
                }
                Revision::Base => {
                    revision.kind = ffi::svn_opt_revision_kind_svn_opt_revision_base;
                }
                Revision::Working => {
                    revision.kind = ffi::svn_opt_revision_kind_svn_opt_revision_working;
                }
                Revision::Head => {
                    revision.kind = ffi::svn_opt_revision_kind_svn_opt_revision_head;
                }
            }
            revision
        }
    }
    impl CommitInfo {
        unsafe fn from_ptr(info: *const ffi::svn_commit_info_t) -> Self {
            unsafe {
                let info = &*info;
                Self {
                    revision: info.revision.try_into().unwrap(),
                    date: apr::char_array_to_string(info.date).unwrap(),
                    author: apr::char_array_to_string(info.author).unwrap(),
                    post_commit_err: apr::char_array_to_string(info.post_commit_err),
                    repos_root: apr::char_array_to_string(info.repos_root),
                }
            }
        }
    }
    unsafe extern "C" fn commit_callback(
        commit_info: *const ffi::svn_commit_info_t,
        baton: *mut c_void,
        pool: *mut ffi::apr_pool_t,
    ) -> *mut ffi::svn_error_t {
        unsafe {
            let error = on_cancel(baton);
            if !error.is_null() {
                return error;
            }
            let commit_info = CommitInfo::from_ptr(commit_info);
            let this = &mut *(baton as *mut ContextInner);
            this.commit_info = Some(commit_info);
            svn_no_error()
        }
    }
    impl Lock {
        fn from_ptr(ptr: *const ffi::svn_lock_t) -> Self {
            unsafe {
                let lock = ptr.as_ref().unwrap();
                let path = apr::char_array_to_string(lock.path).unwrap();
                let token = apr::char_array_to_string(lock.token).unwrap();
                let owner = apr::char_array_to_string(lock.owner).unwrap();
                let comment = apr::char_array_to_string(lock.comment).unwrap();
                let is_dav_comment = lock.is_dav_comment != 0;
                let creation_date: i64 = lock.creation_date.try_into().unwrap();
                let expiration_date: i64 = lock.expiration_date.try_into().unwrap();
                Self {
                    path,
                    token,
                    owner,
                    comment,
                    is_dav_comment,
                    creation_date,
                    expiration_date,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    impl StatusEntry {
        unsafe fn from_path_and_ptr(
            path: *const c_char,
            entry: *const ffi::svn_client_status_t,
        ) -> Self {
            unsafe {
                let path = apr::char_array_to_string(path).unwrap();
                let entry = &*entry;
                let node_kind = NodeKind::try_from(entry.kind).unwrap();
                let local_absolute_path = apr::char_array_to_string(entry.local_abspath)
                    .unwrap();
                let file_size = if entry.filesize == -1 {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(entry.filesize.try_into().unwrap())
                };
                let versioned = entry.versioned != 0;
                let conflicted = entry.conflicted != 0;
                let node_status = NodeStatus::try_from(entry.node_status).unwrap();
                let text_status = NodeStatus::try_from(entry.text_status).unwrap();
                let prop_status = NodeStatus::try_from(entry.prop_status).unwrap();
                let wc_is_locked = entry.wc_is_locked != 0;
                let copied = entry.copied != 0;
                let repos_root_url = apr::char_array_to_string(entry.repos_root_url);
                let repos_uuid = apr::char_array_to_string(entry.repos_uuid);
                let repos_relpath = apr::char_array_to_string(entry.repos_relpath);
                let revision = RevisionNumber::try_from(entry.revision).unwrap();
                let last_changed_revision: RevisionNumber = entry
                    .changed_rev
                    .try_into()
                    .unwrap();
                let last_changed_date: i64 = entry.changed_date.try_into().unwrap();
                let last_changed_author = apr::char_array_to_string(
                    entry.changed_author,
                );
                let switched = entry.switched != 0;
                let file_external = entry.file_external != 0;
                let lock = if entry.lock.is_null() {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(Lock::from_ptr(entry.lock))
                };
                let changelist = apr::char_array_to_string(entry.changelist);
                let depth = Depth::try_from(entry.depth).unwrap();
                let out_of_date_kind = NodeKind::try_from(entry.ood_kind).unwrap();
                let repos_node_status = NodeStatus::try_from(entry.repos_node_status)
                    .unwrap();
                let repos_text_status = NodeStatus::try_from(entry.repos_text_status)
                    .unwrap();
                let repos_prop_status = NodeStatus::try_from(entry.repos_prop_status)
                    .unwrap();
                let repos_lock = if entry.repos_lock.is_null() {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(Lock::from_ptr(entry.repos_lock))
                };
                let out_of_date_changed_revision = if entry.ood_changed_rev == -1 {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(entry.ood_changed_rev.try_into().unwrap())
                };
                let out_of_date_changed_date = if entry.ood_changed_date == 0 {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(entry.ood_changed_date.try_into().unwrap())
                };
                let out_of_date_changed_author = apr::char_array_to_string(
                    entry.ood_changed_author,
                );
                let moved_from_absolute_path = apr::char_array_to_string(
                    entry.moved_from_abspath,
                );
                let moved_to_absolute_path = apr::char_array_to_string(
                    entry.moved_to_abspath,
                );
                Self {
                    path,
                    node_kind,
                    local_absolute_path,
                    file_size,
                    versioned,
                    conflicted,
                    node_status,
                    text_status,
                    prop_status,
                    wc_is_locked,
                    copied,
                    repos_root_url,
                    repos_uuid,
                    repos_relpath,
                    revision,
                    last_changed_revision,
                    last_changed_date,
                    last_changed_author,
                    switched,
                    file_external,
                    lock,
                    changelist,
                    depth,
                    out_of_date_kind,
                    repos_node_status,
                    repos_text_status,
                    repos_prop_status,
                    repos_lock,
                    out_of_date_changed_revision,
                    out_of_date_changed_date,
                    out_of_date_changed_author,
                    moved_from_absolute_path,
                    moved_to_absolute_path,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    impl Default for NodeStatus {
        fn default() -> Self {
            Self::None
        }
    }

        #[inline]
        fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {
            ::core::fmt::Formatter::debug_struct_field1_finish(
                f,
                "LogResult",
                "log_entries",
                &&self.log_entries,
            )
        }
    }
    #[automatically_derived]
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi::FfiConverter<UT> for LogResult {
        type FfiType = ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer;
        fn lower(v: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            let mut buf = ::std::vec::Vec::new();
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(v, &mut buf);
            ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer::from_vec(buf)
        }
        fn try_lift(buf: ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            let vec = buf.destroy_into_vec();
            let mut buf = vec.as_slice();
            let value = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
                crate::UniFfiTag,
            >>::try_read(&mut buf)?;
            match ::uniffi_core::deps::bytes::Buf::remaining(&buf) {
                0 => ::std::result::Result::Ok(value),
                n => {
                    return ::anyhow::__private::Err({
                        let error = ::anyhow::__private::format_err(
                            format_args!(
                                "junk data left in buffer after lifting (count: {0})",
                                n,
                            ),
                        );
                        error
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <Vec<
                LogEntry,
            > as ::uniffi::Lower<crate::UniFfiTag>>::write(obj.log_entries, buf);
        }
        fn try_read(
            buf: &mut &[::std::primitive::u8],
        ) -> ::uniffi::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(Self {
                log_entries: <Vec<
                    LogEntry,
                > as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_read(buf)?,
            })
        }
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
                ::uniffi::metadata::codes::TYPE_RECORD,
            )
            .concat_str("engine")
            .concat_str("LogResult");
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT> for LogResult {
        type FfiType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::FfiType;
        fn lower(obj: Self) -> Self::FfiType {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::lower(obj)
        }
        fn write(obj: Self, buf: &mut ::std::vec::Vec<u8>) {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::write(obj, buf)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::Lift<UT> for LogResult {
        type FfiType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::FfiType;
        fn try_lift(v: Self::FfiType) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::try_lift(v)
        }
        fn try_read(buf: &mut &[u8]) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<UT>>::try_read(buf)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LowerReturn<UT> for LogResult {
        type ReturnType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT>>::FfiType;
        fn lower_return(
            v: Self,
        ) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<
            Self::ReturnType,
            ::uniffi_core::RustCallError,
        > {
            ::std::result::Result::Ok(<Self as ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT>>::lower(v))
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LowerError<UT> for LogResult {
        fn lower_error(obj: Self) -> ::uniffi_core::RustBuffer {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lower<UT>>::lower_into_rust_buffer(obj)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LiftReturn<UT> for LogResult {
        type ReturnType = <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lift<UT>>::FfiType;
        fn try_lift_successful_return(
            v: Self::ReturnType,
        ) -> ::uniffi_core::Result<Self> {
            <Self as ::uniffi_core::Lift<UT>>::try_lift(v)
        }
    }
    unsafe impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::LiftRef<UT> for LogResult {
        type LiftType = Self;
    }
    impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::ConvertError<UT> for LogResult {
        fn try_convert_unexpected_callback_error(
            e: ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackError,
        ) -> ::uniffi_core::deps::anyhow::Result<Self> {
            {
                pub trait GetConverterGeneric {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterGeneric;
                }
                impl<T> GetConverterGeneric for &T {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterGeneric {
                        ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterGeneric
                    }
                }
                #[allow(dead_code)]
                pub trait GetConverterSpecialized {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized;
                }
                impl<T: ::std::convert::Into<LogResult>> GetConverterSpecialized for T {
                    fn get_converter(
                        &self,
                    ) -> ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized {
                        ::uniffi_core::UnexpectedUniFFICallbackErrorConverterSpecialized
                    }
                }
                (&e).get_converter().try_convert_unexpected_callback_error(e)
            }
        }
    }
    impl<UT> ::uniffi_core::TypeId<UT> for LogResult {
        const TYPE_ID_META: ::uniffi_core::MetadataBuffer = <Self as ::uniffi_core::FfiConverter<
            UT,
        >>::TYPE_ID_META;
    }
    const UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_RECORD_LOGRESULT: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
            ::uniffi::metadata::codes::RECORD,
        )
        .concat_str("engine")
        .concat_str("LogResult")
        .concat_value(1u8)
        .concat_str("log_entries")
        .concat(<Vec<LogEntry> as ::uniffi::TypeId<crate::UniFfiTag>>::TYPE_ID_META)
        .concat_bool(false)
        .concat_long_str("")
        .concat_long_str("");
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
    #[doc(hidden)]
    pub static UNIFFI_META_ENGINE_RECORD_LOGRESULT: [u8; UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_RECORD_LOGRESULT
        .size] = UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_RECORD_LOGRESULT.into_array();
    impl Default for NodeKind {
        fn default() -> Self {
            NodeKind::None
        }
    }
    impl CommitItem {
        unsafe fn from_items(items: *const ffi::apr_array_header_t) -> Vec<Self> {
            let items = unsafe { &*items };
            let mut ret = Vec::with_capacity(items.nelts.try_into().unwrap());
            for i in 0..items.nelts {
                let elements = items.elts
                    as *const *const ffi::svn_client_commit_item3_t;
                let element = unsafe {
                    let offset = elements.offset(i as _);
                    if (*offset).is_null() {
                        continue;
                    }
                    *offset
                };
                let item = unsafe { Self::from_item(element) };
                ret.push(item);
            }
            ret
        }
        unsafe fn from_item(item: *const ffi::svn_client_commit_item3_t) -> Self {
            unsafe {
                let item = &*item;
                let path = apr::char_array_to_string(item.path).unwrap();
                let kind = NodeKind::try_from(item.kind).unwrap();
                let url = apr::char_array_to_string(item.url).unwrap();
                let copy_from_url = apr::char_array_to_string(item.copyfrom_url);
                let mut incoming_property_changes = HashMap::new();
                if !item.incoming_prop_changes.is_null() {
                    let prop = &*item.incoming_prop_changes;
                    incoming_property_changes.reserve(prop.nelts as _);
                    for i in 0..prop.nelts {
                        let elements = prop.elts as *const *const ffi::svn_prop_t;
                        let offset = elements.offset(i as _);
                        if (*offset).is_null() {
                            continue;
                        }
                        let element = &**offset;
                        let key = apr::char_array_to_string(element.name).unwrap();
                        let slice = std::slice::from_raw_parts(
                            (*element.value).data as *const u8,
                            (*element.value).len,
                        );
                        let value = String::from_utf8(slice.to_vec()).unwrap();
                        incoming_property_changes.insert(key, value);
                    }
                }
                let mut outgoing_property_changes = HashMap::new();
                if !item.outgoing_prop_changes.is_null() {
                    let prop = &*item.outgoing_prop_changes;
                    outgoing_property_changes.reserve(prop.nelts as _);
                    for i in 0..prop.nelts {
                        let elements = prop.elts as *const *const ffi::svn_prop_t;
                        let offset = elements.offset(i as _);
                        if (*offset).is_null() {
                            continue;
                        }
                        let element = &**offset;
                        let key = apr::char_array_to_string(element.name).unwrap();
                        let slice = std::slice::from_raw_parts(
                            (*element.value).data as *const u8,
                            (*element.value).len,
                        );
                        let value = String::from_utf8(slice.to_vec()).unwrap();
                        outgoing_property_changes.insert(key, value);
                    }
                }
                let revision = item.revision.try_into().unwrap();
                let state = item.state_flags;
                let session_real_path = apr::char_array_to_string(item.session_relpath);
                let copy_from_revision = if item.copyfrom_url.is_null()
                    || item.copyfrom_rev < 0
                {
                    None
                } else {
                    Some(item.copyfrom_rev.try_into().unwrap())
                };
                let move_from_absolute_path = apr::char_array_to_string(
                    item.moved_from_abspath,
                );
                Self {
                    path,
                    kind,
                    url,
                    revision,
                    copy_from_url,
                    copy_from_revision,
                    state,
                    incoming_property_changes,
                    outgoing_property_changes,
                    session_real_path,
                    move_from_absolute_path,
                }
            }
        }
    }
    unsafe fn char_from_pool(string: &str, pool: *mut ffi::apr_pool_t) -> *const c_char {
        let mut bytes = ::alloc::vec::from_elem(0, string.len() + 1);
        bytes[..string.len()].copy_from_slice(string.as_bytes());
        unsafe { ffi::apr_pstrndup(pool, bytes.as_ptr() as _, bytes.len()) }
    }
    unsafe extern "C" fn on_progress_notify(
        progress: ffi::apr_off_t,
        total: ffi::apr_off_t,
        baton: *mut c_void,
        pool: *mut ffi::apr_pool_t,
    ) {
        unsafe {
            let this = &*(baton as *mut ContextInner);
            this.context_notifier
                .progress_notify(
                    progress.try_into().unwrap(),
                    total.try_into().unwrap(),
                );
        }
    }
    unsafe extern "C" fn on_cancel(baton: *mut c_void) -> *mut ffi::svn_error_t {
        unsafe {
            let ctx = &mut *(baton as *mut ContextInner);
            if let Some(msg) = ctx.context_notifier.cancel() {
                let mut pool = apr::Pool::create();
                return ffi::svn_error_create(
                    ffi::svn_errno_t_SVN_ERR_CANCELLED as _,
                    std::ptr::null_mut(),
                    pool.string(msg.as_str()).unwrap_or(std::ptr::null_mut()) as _,
                );
            }
        }
        svn_no_error()
    }
    unsafe extern "C" fn on_get_commit_message(
        log_msg: *mut *const c_char,
        tmp_file: *mut *const c_char,
        commit_items: *const ffi::apr_array_header_t,
        baton: *mut c_void,
        pool: *mut ffi::apr_pool_t,
    ) -> *mut ffi::svn_error_t {
        if baton.is_null() {
            {
                use ::tracing::__macro_support::Callsite as _;
                static __CALLSITE: ::tracing::callsite::DefaultCallsite = {
                    static META: ::tracing::Metadata<'static> = {
                        ::tracing_core::metadata::Metadata::new(
                            "event src/subversion/context.rs:1158",
                            "engine::subversion::context",
                            ::tracing::Level::ERROR,
                            ::tracing_core::__macro_support::Option::Some(
                                "src/subversion/context.rs",
                            ),
                            ::tracing_core::__macro_support::Option::Some(1158u32),
                            ::tracing_core::__macro_support::Option::Some(
                                "engine::subversion::context",
                            ),
                            ::tracing_core::field::FieldSet::new(
                                &["message"],
                                ::tracing_core::callsite::Identifier(&__CALLSITE),
                            ),
                            ::tracing::metadata::Kind::EVENT,
                        )
                    };
                    ::tracing::callsite::DefaultCallsite::new(&META)
                };
                let enabled = ::tracing::Level::ERROR
                    <= ::tracing::level_filters::STATIC_MAX_LEVEL
                    && ::tracing::Level::ERROR
                        <= ::tracing::level_filters::LevelFilter::current()
                    && {
                        let interest = __CALLSITE.interest();
                        !interest.is_never()
                            && ::tracing::__macro_support::__is_enabled(
                                __CALLSITE.metadata(),
                                interest,
                            )
                    };
                if enabled {
                    (|value_set: ::tracing::field::ValueSet| {
                        let meta = __CALLSITE.metadata();
                        ::tracing::Event::dispatch(meta, &value_set);
                    })({
                        #[allow(unused_imports)]
                        use ::tracing::field::{debug, display, Value};
                        let mut iter = __CALLSITE.metadata().fields().iter();
                        __CALLSITE
                            .metadata()
                            .fields()
                            .value_set(
                                &[
                                    (
                                        &::tracing::__macro_support::Iterator::next(&mut iter)
                                            .expect("FieldSet corrupted (this is a bug)"),
                                        ::tracing::__macro_support::Option::Some(
                                            &format_args!("baton is null") as &dyn Value,
                                        ),
                                    ),
                                ],
                            )
                    });
                } else {
                }
            };
            return svn_no_error();
        }
        unsafe {
            let this = &mut *(baton as *mut ContextInner);
            *log_msg = char_from_pool(&this.commit_message, pool);
            this.commit_message.clear();
            *tmp_file = std::ptr::null();
            let items = CommitItem::from_items(commit_items);
            this.commit_items.extend(items);
        }
        svn_no_error()
    }
    unsafe extern "C" fn on_notify(
        baton: *mut c_void,
        notify: *const ffi::svn_wc_notify_t,
        pool: *mut ffi::apr_pool_t,
    ) {
        unsafe {
            let this = &mut *(baton as *mut ContextInner);
            this.context_notifier
                .working_copy_notify(WorkingCopyNotify::from_raw(notify));
        }
    }
    impl Default for Depth {
        fn default() -> Self {
            Depth::Unknown
        }
    }
    unsafe extern "C" fn status_callback(
        baton: *mut c_void,
        path: *const c_char,
        status: *const ffi::svn_client_status_t,
        pool: *mut ffi::apr_pool_t,
    ) -> *mut ffi::svn_error_t {
        let this = unsafe { &mut *(baton as *mut ContextInner) };
        {
            use ::tracing::__macro_support::Callsite as _;
            static __CALLSITE: ::tracing::callsite::DefaultCallsite = {
                static META: ::tracing::Metadata<'static> = {
                    ::tracing_core::metadata::Metadata::new(
                        "event src/subversion/context.rs:1210",
                        "engine::subversion::context",
                        ::tracing::Level::INFO,
                        ::tracing_core::__macro_support::Option::Some(
                            "src/subversion/context.rs",
                        ),
                        ::tracing_core::__macro_support::Option::Some(1210u32),
                        ::tracing_core::__macro_support::Option::Some(
                            "engine::subversion::context",
                        ),
                        ::tracing_core::field::FieldSet::new(
                            &["message"],
                            ::tracing_core::callsite::Identifier(&__CALLSITE),
                        ),
                        ::tracing::metadata::Kind::EVENT,
                    )
                };
                ::tracing::callsite::DefaultCallsite::new(&META)
            };
            let enabled = ::tracing::Level::INFO
                <= ::tracing::level_filters::STATIC_MAX_LEVEL
                && ::tracing::Level::INFO
                    <= ::tracing::level_filters::LevelFilter::current()
                && {
                    let interest = __CALLSITE.interest();
                    !interest.is_never()
                        && ::tracing::__macro_support::__is_enabled(
                            __CALLSITE.metadata(),
                            interest,
                        )
                };
            if enabled {
                (|value_set: ::tracing::field::ValueSet| {
                    let meta = __CALLSITE.metadata();
                    ::tracing::Event::dispatch(meta, &value_set);
                })({
                    #[allow(unused_imports)]
                    use ::tracing::field::{debug, display, Value};
                    let mut iter = __CALLSITE.metadata().fields().iter();
                    __CALLSITE
                        .metadata()
                        .fields()
                        .value_set(
                            &[
                                (
                                    &::tracing::__macro_support::Iterator::next(&mut iter)
                                        .expect("FieldSet corrupted (this is a bug)"),
                                    ::tracing::__macro_support::Option::Some(
                                        &format_args!("Add entry") as &dyn Value,
                                    ),
                                ),
                            ],
                        )
                });
            } else {
            }
        };
        let entry = unsafe { StatusEntry::from_path_and_ptr(path, status) };
        {
            use ::tracing::__macro_support::Callsite as _;
            static __CALLSITE: ::tracing::callsite::DefaultCallsite = {
                static META: ::tracing::Metadata<'static> = {
                    ::tracing_core::metadata::Metadata::new(
                        "event src/subversion/context.rs:1212",
                        "engine::subversion::context",
                        ::tracing::Level::INFO,
                        ::tracing_core::__macro_support::Option::Some(
                            "src/subversion/context.rs",
                        ),
                        ::tracing_core::__macro_support::Option::Some(1212u32),
                        ::tracing_core::__macro_support::Option::Some(
                            "engine::subversion::context",
                        ),
                        ::tracing_core::field::FieldSet::new(
                            &["message"],
                            ::tracing_core::callsite::Identifier(&__CALLSITE),
                        ),
                        ::tracing::metadata::Kind::EVENT,
                    )
                };
                ::tracing::callsite::DefaultCallsite::new(&META)
            };
            let enabled = ::tracing::Level::INFO
                <= ::tracing::level_filters::STATIC_MAX_LEVEL
                && ::tracing::Level::INFO
                    <= ::tracing::level_filters::LevelFilter::current()
                && {
                    let interest = __CALLSITE.interest();
                    !interest.is_never()
                        && ::tracing::__macro_support::__is_enabled(
                            __CALLSITE.metadata(),
                            interest,
                        )
                };
            if enabled {
                (|value_set: ::tracing::field::ValueSet| {
                    let meta = __CALLSITE.metadata();
                    ::tracing::Event::dispatch(meta, &value_set);
                })({
                    #[allow(unused_imports)]
                    use ::tracing::field::{debug, display, Value};
                    let mut iter = __CALLSITE.metadata().fields().iter();
                    __CALLSITE
                        .metadata()
                        .fields()
                        .value_set(
                            &[
                                (
                                    &::tracing::__macro_support::Iterator::next(&mut iter)
                                        .expect("FieldSet corrupted (this is a bug)"),
                                    ::tracing::__macro_support::Option::Some(
                                        &format_args!("translated entry") as &dyn Value,
                                    ),
                                ),
                            ],
                        )
                });
            } else {
            }
        };
        this.status_entries.push(entry);
        svn_no_error()
    }
    fn svn_err_general_into_u32(err: SvnErrnoGeneral) -> u32 {
        err.into()
    }
    #[doc(hidden)]
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
    pub extern "C" fn uniffi_engine_fn_func_svn_err_general_into_u32(
        err: <SvnErrnoGeneral as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::FfiType,
        call_status: &mut ::uniffi::RustCallStatus,
    ) -> <u32 as ::uniffi::LowerReturn<crate::UniFfiTag>>::ReturnType {
        let uniffi_lift_args = move || ::std::result::Result::Ok((
            match <SvnErrnoGeneral as ::uniffi::Lift<crate::UniFfiTag>>::try_lift(err) {
                ::std::result::Result::Ok(v) => v,
                ::std::result::Result::Err(e) => {
                    return ::std::result::Result::Err(("err", e));
                }
            },
        ));
        ::uniffi::rust_call(
            call_status,
            || {
                let result = match uniffi_lift_args() {
                    ::std::result::Result::Ok(uniffi_args) => {
                        let uniffi_result = svn_err_general_into_u32(uniffi_args.0);
                        let uniffi_lowered_return = <u32 as ::uniffi::LowerReturn<
                            crate::UniFfiTag,
                        >>::lower_return(uniffi_result);
                        uniffi_lowered_return
                    }
                    ::std::result::Result::Err((arg_name, error)) => {
                        <u32 as ::uniffi::LowerReturn<
                            crate::UniFfiTag,
                        >>::handle_failed_lift(::uniffi::LiftArgsError {
                            arg_name,
                            error,
                        })
                    }
                };
                result
            },
        )
    }
    const UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_FUNC_SVN_ERR_GENERAL_INTO_U32: ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer = ::uniffi::MetadataBuffer::from_code(
            ::uniffi::metadata::codes::FUNC,
        )
        .concat_str("engine")
        .concat_str("svn_err_general_into_u32")
        .concat_bool(false)
        .concat_value(1u8)
        .concat_str("err")
        .concat(<SvnErrnoGeneral as ::uniffi::TypeId<crate::UniFfiTag>>::TYPE_ID_META)
        .concat_bool(false)
        .concat(<u32 as ::uniffi::TypeId<crate::UniFfiTag>>::TYPE_ID_META)
        .concat_long_str("");

    #[doc(hidden)]
    #[unsafe(no_mangle)]

        const CHECKSUM: u16 = UNIFFI_META_CONST_ENGINE_FUNC_SVN_ERR_GENERAL_INTO_U32
            .checksum();
        CHECKSUM
    }

    #[automatically_derived]
    impl ::core::fmt::Debug for SvnErrnoGeneral {
        #[inline]
        fn fmt(&self, f: &mut ::core::fmt::Formatter) -> ::core::fmt::Result {

                crate::UniFfiTag,
